description: Common MITRE ATT&CK attack chain patterns for threat prediction.

chains.name: Spear-phishing to data exfiltration
chains.description: Classic phishing-based intrusion leading to data theft.

chains.name: Phishing to ransomware
chains.description: Phishing email leads to ransomware deployment.

chains.name: Drive-by to credential theft
chains.description: Browser exploit leads to credential harvesting.

chains.name: Supply chain persistence
chains.description: Compromised software leads to persistent backdoor.

chains.name: Valid accounts lateral movement
chains.description: Stolen credentials used for lateral movement and collection.

chains.name: Phishing to lateral movement
chains.description: Phishing leads to discovery, credential theft, and lateral movement.

chains.name: PowerShell-based attack chain
chains.description: PowerShell execution leading to defense evasion and exfiltration.

chains.name: DLL injection with keylogging
chains.description: Process injection enabling keylogging and credential theft.

chains.name: Ransomware kill chain
chains.description: Full ransomware attack from initial access to impact.

chains.name: Credential dumping lateral spread
chains.description: Credential dumping followed by RDP-based lateral movement.

chains.name: Living off the land
chains.description: LOLBins and system binary proxy execution for stealthy operation.

chains.name: SMB lateral movement with exfiltration
chains.description: Lateral movement via SMB shares leading to data theft.

chains.name: Scheduled task persistence
chains.description: Execution via scheduled tasks for persistent access.

chains.name: Service creation persistence
chains.description: Malicious service creation for persistence and C2.

chains.name: Brute force to data collection
chains.description: Brute force credential access leading to data collection.

chains.name: Phishing to process injection
chains.description: Phishing leads to process injection and defense evasion.

chains.name: Encrypted C2 with web exfiltration
chains.description: Encrypted command and control leading to web-based exfiltration.

chains.name: Clipboard data theft
chains.description: Phishing to clipboard monitoring and data exfiltration.

chains.name: UAC bypass privilege escalation
chains.description: Elevation control abuse leading to credential dumping.

chains.name: Discovery and network mapping
chains.description: Broad discovery and network enumeration after initial access.

defensive_recommendations.T1566: Deploy email filtering, enable SPF/DKIM/DMARC, user awareness training.
defensive_recommendations.T1059: Restrict script execution via AppLocker/WDAC, enable script block logging.
defensive_recommendations.T1059.001: Enable PowerShell constrained language mode and script block logging.
defensive_recommendations.T1059.003: Restrict cmd.exe access for non-admin users via Group Policy.
defensive_recommendations.T1204.002: Block macros in Office, deploy sandboxing for document previews.
defensive_recommendations.T1189: Keep browsers patched, use exploit mitigation tools (EMET/Exploit Guard).
defensive_recommendations.T1195: Validate software supply chain integrity, use code signing verification.
defensive_recommendations.T1078: Enforce MFA, monitor for anomalous logon behavior, rotate credentials.
defensive_recommendations.T1110: Enable account lockout policies, deploy MFA, monitor failed logon attempts.
defensive_recommendations.T1003: Enable Credential Guard, restrict debug privileges, monitor LSASS access.
defensive_recommendations.T1055: Enable Attack Surface Reduction rules, monitor for process injection APIs.
defensive_recommendations.T1055.001: Monitor for LoadLibrary/CreateRemoteThread calls, use code integrity.
defensive_recommendations.T1027: Deploy content inspection, monitor for encoded/packed executables.
defensive_recommendations.T1070: Centralize logging to SIEM, enable audit log tamper protection.
defensive_recommendations.T1140: Monitor for certutil/PowerShell decode operations, inspect decoded payloads.
defensive_recommendations.T1218: Monitor LOLBin execution, restrict unnecessary system binaries.
defensive_recommendations.T1562: Monitor for security tool tampering, use tamper protection features.
defensive_recommendations.T1548: Configure UAC to always prompt, monitor for UAC bypass techniques.
defensive_recommendations.T1547.001: Monitor Run keys and Startup folder, restrict write access to these paths.
defensive_recommendations.T1053: Monitor scheduled task creation, restrict task scheduler permissions.
defensive_recommendations.T1543: Monitor service creation events, restrict service install privileges.
defensive_recommendations.T1082: Monitor for enumeration commands (systeminfo, hostname, whoami).
defensive_recommendations.T1083: Monitor file system enumeration, restrict sensitive directory listings.
defensive_recommendations.T1057: Monitor process listing commands, limit process visibility where possible.
defensive_recommendations.T1016: Monitor network configuration commands (ipconfig, arp, route).
defensive_recommendations.T1021: Restrict remote service access, enforce network segmentation.
defensive_recommendations.T1021.001: Restrict RDP access, use NLA, enable RDP audit logging.
defensive_recommendations.T1021.002: Disable admin shares where unneeded, monitor SMB lateral movement.
defensive_recommendations.T1005: Classify sensitive data, apply DLP policies, encrypt files at rest.
defensive_recommendations.T1560: Monitor for compression tool usage, inspect outbound archive files.
defensive_recommendations.T1115: Monitor clipboard access APIs, restrict clipboard access for services.
defensive_recommendations.T1056.001: Monitor for keylogger indicators, use credential managers.
defensive_recommendations.T1552: Remove cleartext credentials from scripts and files, use vaults.
defensive_recommendations.T1071: Deploy network monitoring, inspect HTTP/DNS traffic for anomalies.
defensive_recommendations.T1573: Deploy TLS inspection, monitor for non-standard encrypted channels.
defensive_recommendations.T1105: Monitor for file downloads from external IPs, inspect transferred tools.
defensive_recommendations.T1041: Monitor C2 channel bandwidth, deploy DLP on egress traffic.
defensive_recommendations.T1567: Block unauthorized cloud storage, monitor web service uploads.
defensive_recommendations.T1048: Monitor for DNS tunneling and non-standard protocol exfiltration.
defensive_recommendations.T1486: Maintain offline backups, deploy anti-ransomware tools, restrict encryption.
defensive_recommendations.T1489: Protect critical services, monitor for service stop events.
defensive_recommendations.T1490: Protect shadow copies, monitor vssadmin/wmic shadowcopy calls.
defensive_recommendations.T1555: Use credential managers with MFA, monitor browser credential store access.
